---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the patrol system
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this to work? Be as detailed as possible.

## Alternative Solutions

Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## Use Cases

Describe scenarios where this feature would be useful:

1. When [scenario], this feature would [benefit]
2. For users who [situation], this would [improvement]

## Implementation Ideas

If you have thoughts on how this could be implemented (optional):

- Technical approach
- Configuration options needed
- API endpoints involved (if known)

## Camera Compatibility

Which cameras should this feature support?

- [ ] G5 PTZ
- [ ] G6 PTZ
- [ ] All PTZ cameras
- [ ] Other:

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical — Blocking my use of the system
- [ ] High — Significantly improves functionality
- [ ] Medium — Nice to have
- [ ] Low — Minor enhancement

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I'd be willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I can help test this feature
- [ ] I can provide feedback during development
- [ ] I'm just suggesting this idea
